description: Apply all compliance/copy updates across the Zevrian site: remove shipping claims, update private label references to reflect wholesale/FBA positioning, update FAQ answers, fix footer tagline, update meta descriptions, and flag WhatsApp placeholder.
steps: 1. src/app/page.tsx - Hero subtitle: Change 'Private label · Amazon FBA' to 'Amazon FBA'

2. src/app/page.tsx - Hero body text: Remove 'delivered worldwide through our' phrasing (replace 'and delivered worldwide through our Zevrian Direct storefront on Amazon.' with 'available through our Zevrian Direct storefront on Amazon.')

3. src/app/page.tsx - Brand story section: Change 'As a focused private-label company, we develop a tight, intentional catalog rather than chasing trends. Each product is engineered with premium materials and brought to customers worldwide through Amazon fulfillment.' to 'As an Amazon FBA wholesale business, we develop a tight, intentional catalog rather than chasing trends. Each product is engineered with premium materials and available through Amazon fulfillment.'

4. src/components/sections/AmazonTrustSection.tsx - Remove the third card entirely ('Shipped to 150+ countries' with globe icon and 'From Sheridan, Wyoming to your door' detail). Keep only the first two cards (Fulfilled by Amazon and Easy returns). Change the grid from sm:grid-cols-3 to sm:grid-cols-2.

5. src/components/sections/FaqSection.tsx - Update 'Does Zevrian ship internationally?' answer to: 'Shipping availability varies by country. Please check your specific Amazon listing to confirm delivery options in your area.'

6. src/components/sections/FaqSection.tsx - Update 'Are you a wholesaler or distributor?' answer to: 'Zevrian currently operates as an Amazon FBA wholesale business, with plans to expand into private label in the future. Manufacturers and supply-chain partners are welcome to reach us through the supplier form on our contact page.'
7. src/app/about/page.tsx - Roadmap Phase 02: Change status from 'In progress' to 'Planned'

8. src/app/about/page.tsx - Hero description: Change 'premium private-label essentials for the kitchen, home, and travel' to 'premium essentials for the kitchen, home, and travel' and add context that it is an Amazon FBA wholesale business
9. src/app/about/page.tsx - Metadata description: Update to remove 'private-label brand' references, reflect 'Amazon FBA wholesale business' positioning
10. src/app/about/page.tsx - OpenGraph description: Same update as metadata

11. src/app/products/page.tsx - Default subtitle: Change 'Premium private-label essentials across kitchen, home, and travel' to 'Premium essentials across kitchen, home, and travel — each one engineered to be a pleasure to own.'
12. src/app/products/page.tsx - Remove 'private label lifestyle products' from keywords array
13. src/components/Footer.tsx - Change 'Premium private-label essentials, available on Amazon under Zevrian Direct.' to 'Premium essentials, available on Amazon under Zevrian Direct.'
14. src/components/Footer.tsx - Bottom paragraph: Change 'operates a private-label and Amazon FBA business' to 'operates an Amazon FBA wholesale business'
15. src/components/TrustBar.tsx - Remove the 'Global Shipping' signal entirely (the 4th item with 'Delivered to 150+ countries'). Change the grid from lg:grid-cols-4 to lg:grid-cols-3.

16. src/lib/site.ts - Update description field: Change 'Zevrian designs premium private-label essentials for the kitchen, home, and travel. Discover thoughtfully engineered products, available on Amazon under Zevrian Direct.' to 'Zevrian is an Amazon FBA brand offering premium essentials for the kitchen, home, and travel — available through our Zevrian Direct storefront on Amazon.'
17. src/lib/site.ts - Add a more prominent TODO comment about the WhatsApp placeholder number needing replacement before go-live
18. src/app/layout.tsx - Remove 'private label' from keywords array
19. src/app/terms-of-service/page.tsx - Change 'operates a private-label and Amazon FBA business' to 'operates an Amazon FBA wholesale business'
20. src/app/page.tsx - Brand story narrative: Change 'As a focused private-label company' to 'As a focused Amazon FBA wholesale business'
acceptance_criteria: No instance of '150+ countries' anywhere in the codebase
No instance of 'Global Shipping' (as a heading/label) anywhere
No instance of 'Shipped to 150+ countries' anywhere
No instance of 'From Sheridan, Wyoming to your door' anywhere
No instance of 'delivered with confidence' anywhere
No instance of 'private-label brand, not a wholesaler' anywhere
No instance of 'premium private-label essentials' anywhere
No instance of 'Private label' used as a current/active description (only as future/planned)
Footer tagline reads 'Premium essentials, available on Amazon under Zevrian Direct.'
FAQ 'Does Zevrian ship internationally?' answer updated to new text
FAQ 'Are you a wholesaler or distributor?' answer updated to new text
About page Phase 02 status is 'Planned' not 'In progress'
AmazonTrustSection has only 2 cards (no globe/shipping card)
TrustBar has only 3 signals (no Global Shipping)
WhatsApp placeholder number has a clear TODO/flag comment
Site description in site.ts matches required copy
All TypeScript syntax remains valid (no broken imports or missing variables)
verification: Run grep -r '150+ countries' src/ and confirm zero matches
Run grep -r 'Global Shipping' src/ and confirm zero matches
Run grep -r 'delivered with confidence' src/ and confirm zero matches
Run grep -r 'From Sheridan' src/ and confirm zero matches
Run grep -r 'premium private-label essentials' src/ and confirm zero matches
Run grep -r 'private-label brand, not a wholesaler' src/ and confirm zero matches
Visually inspect all changed files for TypeScript validity
